title: Rich Creamy Slovakian Egg Frittata
description: A quick, lightweight Slovakian-inspired frittata that blends eggs, Greek yogurt, and fresh veggies for a creamy, diabetic-friendly breakfast.
instructions: Melt the butter in an oven‑safe skillet over medium heat and sauté the onion and garlic until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the spinach and roasted red pepper, cooking until the spinach wilts, about 2 minutes.
In a bowl whisk together the eggs, Greek yogurt, shredded cheese, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper until well combined.
Pour the egg mixture into the skillet, stirring gently to distribute the vegetables.
Cook on the stovetop for 3–4 minutes until the edges set but the top is still slightly runny.
Transfer the skillet to the oven and bake for 8–10 minutes, or until the frittata is fully set and lightly golden.
Remove from oven and let rest for 2 minutes before slicing.
Garnish each serving with chopped chives and serve warm.
